configuration.description: A list of configuration objects, each specifying the style of the map.

create_time.description: The time when the map was created.

description.description: A brief description of the map.

id.description: The unique identifier for the map.

map_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the map.

tags.description: A set of key-value pairs assigned to the map.

update_time.description: The time when the map was last updated.
